raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "California is experiencing worsening drought conditions as a symptom of its climate crisis.",
    "Extreme drought conditions are currently affecting all of Assemblymember Rivas’ district according to federal drought tracking.",
    "Santa Clara County has mandated a 15% reduction in water usage compared to 2019 levels.",
    "AB 271 aims to ensure the timely, expert completion of the Anderson Dam Seismic Retrofit Project in Santa Clara County to safeguard the local water supply.",
    "AB 252 would create a pilot program to repurpose fallowed agricultural land for less water-intensive uses."
  ]
}
```
